name: Brighteyes (Distracting Killer Aka You)
description:
Brighteye is distracting the killer (you) on her very own risks so other survivor can finish the generator and finish the round quickly. And no she's unrelated to shedihsky so it isnt an NTR.

Tags: Forsaken, Twerking, Twerk, Distracting, Roblox, Booty.
